title: 1:13:7 Ek Tera Saath
overview: Sitting in his palace in Rajasthan, amongst the ghosts of his royal ancestors, Prince Aditya Pratap Singh mourns the loss of his wife. His mundane life changes when a man is murdered in his haveli and the ghosts come knocking.
